content.en:
Ghost Boy!

Except for some new Dao Ancestors, other Dao Ancestors have basically heard of this name.

The ghost son of the Heavenly Demon Sect, this is a legendary figure, his reputation once resounded in the vast sea realm, he is a sevenfold heavenly dao ancestor, but his reputation is not lower than that of the eightfold heavenly supreme strong dao ancestor.

In the Heavenly Demon Sect, the status of the ghost boy was not weaker than those Eight Heavens Supreme Dao Ancestors.

The strength of the devil is very strong, far surpassing the other Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and even the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestors have openly admitted that they are not as good as the ghost sons.

The ghost boy doesn't like to use the title of Dao Ancestor, so he likes others to call him the ghost boy, so he keeps calling him like this.

"Shiying Dao Ancestor, hey, I don't actually want to expose it!"

The ghost boy appeared, followed by some Heavenly Demon Sect's Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

As soon as he appeared, it also represented that the Heavenly Demon Sect had taken refuge in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

The Heavenly Demon Sect is also an eightfold heavenly force, and it is an old eightfold heavenly force, but he didn't expect to completely surrender to the Heavenly Emperor Palace silently, which was beyond everyone's expectations.

"Ghost boy, you hurry up and delay time for me!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor hurriedly urged.

"No problem!"

The ghost boy responded.

Wow!

The ghost boy entered and directly confronted the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor.

Bang!!!

The two Dao Techniques collided directly, but the Ghost Master stood still, and the Heavenly Claw Daozi flew out upside down.

There was no doubt that the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor was no opponent.

At this time, the Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor and the Demon Dao Ancestor also joined in and joined forces to fight against the ghost boy, which suppressed the ghost boy a little.

But in this way, the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Heavenly Demon Sect's Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors suppressed the Heavenly Sea Sect, the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, and the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Mitian Sect.

The war continued, and the fighting was fierce.

Ye Tian and a group of Dao Ancestors were watching and did not participate in the fight.

After a while, the three major Eightfold Heaven forces of King Kong City, Heavenly Sword Sect, and Heavenly Buddha Sect participated in the war, obviously negotiating cooperation with the three major Nine Heavens forces of the Mitian Sect, the Heavenly Sea Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple.

Although there were not many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors of these three Eightfold Heavenly Forces, they were a new force, which turned the situation around at once and suppressed the side of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Abrupt.

A Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace took out a small token with a seriously injured body, urged this small token, turned into a small sword, and directly erupted with a blow comparable to that of the strongest Dao Ancestor.

Rumble!!!

A Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect was directly pierced through his body by this blow, and his entire body exploded, completely falling and dying.

Of course, this Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor also ran out of strength and was killed by another Heavenly Sea Sect's Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

The battle became more and more fierce, and a famous Sevenfold Dao Ancestor used his hole cards, so there were constantly Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors who were severely injured and even fell and died.

Of course, the fallen Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors were only Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors who had worse means of preserving their lives, and none of those powerful Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors had fallen.

In a short period of time, the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace had almost exhausted their hole cards, and their advantage was getting smaller and smaller.

And when the Seven Heavenly Emperor Palace Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors fell, and the defense line began to gradually collapse, the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor was also anxious.

"Ghost boy, quickly cast your ghost domain, and give me to continue to delay time!"

Shi Ying Dao ancestral voice.

"Understood!"

The ghost boy replied.

The Ghost Domain was the only supreme Dao technique he had cultivated, and its power was terrifying.

The Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors usually don't go to cultivate the Supreme Dao Technique, because it is too difficult to cultivate, and their cultivation of the Great Thousand Dao Technique is enough to cultivate for a lifetime, so there is no need to cultivate that Supreme Dao Technique.

Moreover, it was not necessarily a good thing for the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor to cultivate the Supreme Dao Technique.

The Supreme Dao Technique contains the Supreme Dao Technique, but other people's Supreme Dao Technique is not suitable for oneself, once one cultivates other people's Supreme Dao Technique, the body contains the Supreme Brand of other people, and the consequence of doing so is to affect oneself to become the Supreme Dao Ancestor.

Normally, only those Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors who gave up becoming the Supreme Dao Ancestor would go to cultivate the Supreme Dao Technique.

However, who is willing to give up the hope of becoming a Supreme Dao Ancestor?

Therefore, there are very few people among the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors who have cultivated the Supreme Dao Technique, and even if they have cultivated the Supreme Dao Technique, those Dao Ancestors themselves are not strong in terms of background, and their strength is not strong, coupled with the Supreme Dao Technique, their combat effectiveness is not very powerful.

Similar to the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, the Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor, the Demon Demon Dao Ancestor, and the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, these Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, it is impossible to cultivate the Supreme Dao Technique.

The reason why the ghost boy is so famous is because he created a powerful Dao technique - Ghost Domain!

It was precisely because of the Ghost Domain that he was able to compete with the strongest Dao Ancestor with the qualifications and abilities.

Airplanes!!!!

A dark wave emerged, covering this area, directly enveloping the Dao Ancestors of the Mitian Sect, the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, the Tianhai Sect, and the other three major Eight Heavens forces.

What's even more speechless is that because the area covered by the ghost domain is too large and not easy to control, the area where Ye Tian is located is directly covered into it, so that Ye Tian is also in the ghost domain.

The Ghost Domain, a supreme Dao technique, is similar to a realm that suppresses the enemy's strength, but it also has one of the characteristics of the Dark Forbidden Domain, that is, it creates illusions, and it is an offensive illusion that can even affect the soul of the enemy.

Once affected by the ghost domain, even if the strength is very strong, it is not the opponent of the ghost son.

Hiss!!

A group of ghost realm creatures appeared and appeared at Ye Tian's side, besieging and killing Ye Tian.

At this moment, Ye Tian was also angry.

"Get out!"

With a cold drink, all these ghost creatures were shattered and turned into points of light and dissipated.

"Ghost boy, dare to be my opponent, don't blame me for besieging you!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Swish!

He cast the Heavenly Illusion Divine Step and came to the battlefield of the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, the Demon Demon Dao Ancestor, the Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor and the Ghost Son.

At this moment, under the influence of the Ghost Domain, the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor couldn't defeat the Ghost Boy at all, and was completely suppressed.

At this pace, the three of them are afraid that they will lose.

"It's the Nine Extremes Heavenly King!"

The Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor saw Ye Tian and was overjoyed in his heart.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, please help us besiege the Ghost Prince!" Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor asked for help.

At this time, the Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor also reacted.

"That's right, the Nine Extremes Heavenly King has a Great Adult Forbidden Body, and the Forbidden Realm of the Great Adult Forbidden Body can definitely compete with the Ghost Domain! Although the three of us have mastered the power of the Dark Taboo, the power of the Dark Forbidden is too weak, and it has not been condensed into a Forbidden Body, let alone a Small Adult Forbidden Body, so we can't use the Forbidden Domain at all. Once we have the help of the Nine Extremes Heavenly King, we can definitely defeat the Ghost Boy!"

As a result, the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, the Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor, and the Demon Demon Dao Ancestor all sent messages to Ye Tian and asked him to help.
